name: apk-competitor-monitor
description: Monitor Android competitor APKs, compare versions, reconstruct static UI changes, and generate PM-facing reports.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze competitor APK changes and PM-facing UI diffs
interface.longDescription: Monitor Android competitor apps from APK sources, compare releases, reconstruct static UI changes, and generate PM-facing reports through either a Codex skill workflow or MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Monitor a Wandoujia app and generate a PM-facing APK change report
Compare two APK files and summarize feature, UI, and SDK changes
Run deep static UI reconstruction for an APK version diff
